title: [Skyship, Worship]
description: Bright banners and runic symbols line the area's bulkheads.  The banners are dotted with varied iconography, from pictographs to vivid color patterns in the threading.  All hang from thick black stone slabs attached to the metal bulkheads.  The symbols on the banners match those carved on stone slabs placed across the floor, the carvings further highlighted on these slabs by a chalky material rubbed into them.  The stone floor is otherwise bare except for a painted white circle in the area's middle.
